_comment: Commerce Phase 2A marketplace contract overrides. Optional, additive per-field override on top of the built-in contracts in modules/commerce/contract_loader.py (SMARTSTORE_CONTRACT / COUPANG_CONTRACT). Empty by default this Sprint -- populate contract_overrides.<platform>.<field> only once a research doc confirms a platform_field name currently marked null/UNKNOWN. See modules/commerce/contract_loader.py::load_contract() for the merge rule.
